description:
After a data migration, the demodb travel agency database contains orphan vertices — Profiles and Hotels with no connecting edges (no friendships, stays, reviews, orders, etc.). Connect to demodb in OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html) using server credentials root / GymAnything123! and database credentials admin / admin. Identify and delete all orphan vertices in the Profiles and Hotels classes that have zero edges. Save an audit report to ~/orientdb_audit_report.txt with this exact format:
Line 1: Orphan Profiles Found: <number>
Line 2: Orphan Hotels Found: <number>
Line 3: Total Orphans Deleted: <number>

[Deleted orphan profile emails, one per line]

[Deleted orphan hotel names, one per line]

Only delete vertices that have zero edges; do not delete any vertex with at least one edge connection.
